Summary: During the 2024 campaign and since taking office, Trump has promised retribution and has already begun targetting percieved political enemies--revoking security details and clearances for critics, criticizied republican official who threaten his agenda, and targetted intellectuals. Elon Musk has used his platform X to lambast Republicans who seem to waver on administration priorities and has promised to fund primary challenges for those who vote contrary to the administration's state policy Threats of political violence by Trump supports have targetted critics inside and outside of the Republican party. In the face of this significant pressure, many former or would be critics have gone silent.
column9: What have we will document: Attack on DEI's policy, immigration and deporations, education, foreign aid, media attacks, FBI, erasure of knowledge, democratic backsliding, judicial changes, private information access, staff purges, dismantle of institutions and individuals rights

This attempted deportation utilized the Immigration and Nationality Act, which allows the Secretary of State to deport "any alien" who poses potential adverse foreign policy consequence--a clause that has only been used once before. In his quest to target dissenters, he has used little-known laws, fired and investigated figures he believes to be disloyal, and revoked security clearances with officials he does not like.
